requested_scope: create one forward-only V151+ migration for learning.alr_* tables only
implement a Python repository with parameterized SQL and explicit connection injection
run an isolated Linux Docker PostgreSQL double-apply and repository integration test
after implementation review, recheck three source heads and Linux cleanliness before a single-migration existing-PG apply
required_controls: no mutation of trading.scanner_snapshots or scanner cadence/score/registry/dispatch
append-only ledger tables with PUBLIC and trading_ai UPDATE/DELETE revoked
unique source identity plus payload-hash conflict-as-error semantics
append-only recovery and watermark events rather than mutable cursor state
no DB identifiers derived from scanner payload and all values bound as SQL parameters
no network, exchange, order, Decision Lease, Cost Gate, serving, promotion, or _latest surface
no existing-PG apply, scanner read, service start, or retention sweep before post-implementation recheck
